channel.title: devops on Articles, Translations, and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in devops on Articles, Translations, and Blog

item.title: Multitasking in System Administration
item.description: Just a quick thought on multitasking in SA (or DevOps, if you prefer). There is a common knowledge that multitasking is bad, it hurts your performance, quality, and whatnot.

item.title: Links: 21st Jul
item.description: This week: technology links, algorithm courses, bootstrap goodies, and Ukrainian IT.
